data.title: Aecon partnership, with Pomerleau and Stantec, to deliver Ontario's Arctic Over-the-Horizon Radar Prog, Stage 1.
data.description: On March 04, 2026, Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) disclosed a significant development. Aecon, in collaboration with Pomerleau and Stantec, has secured a contract with Defence Construction Canada to undertake the Ontario-based Arctic Over-the-Horizon Radar Program Stage 1 project.

data.title: RB Global (RBA) to acquire BigIron, accelerating US agriculture expansion via online marketplace.
data.description: RB Global, Inc. (NYSE: RBA) (TSX: RBA) has finalized a deal to purchase Big Iron Auction Company ("BigIron"), marking a pivotal move into the U.S. agriculture sector. This acquisition will enhance RB Global's position as a prominent player in the global market for insights, services, and transaction solutions. BigIron, a well-established online platform in the agricultural industry, acts as a bridge between buyers and sellers of agricultural equipment, land, and livestock. This strategic acquisition underscores RB Global's commitment to expanding its presence and offerings, solidifying its foothold in the U.S. agriculture market.

data.title: Ardent Health (NYSE: ARDT) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -8.57%, reporting EPS of $0.32 vs. $0.35. Revenue down $1M, past EPS missed by $0.59.
data.description: Ardent Health, listed on NYSE as ARDT, released its Q4 earnings report on March 4, 2026, at 04:15 PM. The report revealed a lower-than-expected performance as they missed estimated earnings by -8.57%, posting an EPS of $0.32 compared to the estimated $0.35. Revenue also saw a decline of $1.00 million from the same period a year ago. Looking back, in the previous quarter, the company missed EPS by $0.59, resulting in a 33.81% decrease in share value. For a detailed analysis, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Niagen Bioscience Q4 earnings exceeded estimates by 200%, reporting EPS of $0.03. Revenue increased by $4.71 million.
data.description: Niagen Bioscience (NASDAQ: NAGE) released its Q4 earnings report on Wednesday, March 4, 2026, at 04:02 PM. Their earnings exceeded expectations by 200.0%, with an EPS of $0.03 compared to the estimated $0.01. Revenue also saw a significant increase, rising by $4.71 million year-over-year. The company has a history of surpassing past earnings. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Veeva Systems shares surge after Q4 results beat estimates with $836 million revenue, $2.06 EPS. Subscription revenue at $707.7 million.
data.description: Cloud-based software company Veeva Systems Inc (NYSE: VEEV) saw a significant surge in its shares following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results and guidance. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $836 million, representing a 16% increase from the previous year and surpassing the Street consensus estimate of $810.6 million. Earnings per share for the quarter stood at $2.06, also beating expectations. Subscription revenue for the quarter reached $707.7 million, up 16% year-over-year. Veeva Systems reported full fiscal year revenue of $3.20 billion, marking a substantial increase. The impressive financial performance propelled VEEV shares higher as investors reacted positively to the news.

data.title: Bitwise contributes $233K from Bitcoin ETF gains to open-source BTC developers in its annual donation.
data.description: Bitwise, a company specializing in managing crypto assets and issuing Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), has made a significant contribution in its most recent annual donation by offering $233,000 to support open-source Bitcoin developers. This move showcases the firm's commitment to advancing the development and expansion of the crypto industry by funding crucial resources and experts in the field.

data.title: US economy is split: Fed Beige Book reports 5 Fed Districts facing flat or declining activity. Stronger consumer demand in data centers.
data.description: The economic momentum in the United States is showing signs of fragmenting, with the latest Beige Book from the Fed revealing a two-speed economy. Five out of twelve Fed Districts are now reporting flat or declining activity, up from four previously. The report indicates an uneven expansion, with weak consumer demand but stronger manufacturing linked to data-center infrastructure. The Consumer Engine Is Losing Power, as consumer spending is increasing but with a trend towards cautiousness and price sensitivity. The report highlights struggling low- and middle-income households, with rising demand for food assistance and declining vehicle sales. On the other hand, manufacturing is experiencing a revival driven by data centers, with eight districts reporting factory growth. The report points to an economy facing challenges and strengths in different sectors.

data.title: Ellomay Capital announces sale of 45.9% shares to Nofar Energy Ltd., changes in principal shareholders and board composition.
data.description: Tel-Aviv, Israel, March 04, 2026 - Ellomay Capital Ltd., a company specializing in renewable energy and power projects in Europe, Israel, and the USA, recently disclosed a significant transaction. The Company's main shareholders, S. Nechama Investments (2008) Ltd., Kanir Joint Investments (2005) LP, and Ms. Anat Raphael, who collectively own around 45.9% of the Company's total shares, have completed the sale of all their ordinary shares to O.Y. Nofar Energy Ltd., a public entity listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd. (TASE: NOFR).

data.title: IREN buys 50,000 NVIDIA B300 GPUs to expand AI cloud capacity to 150,000 GPUs.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed their recent acquisition of over 50,000 NVIDIA B300 GPUs. This move brings their total GPU fleet to 150,000 units, marking a substantial expansion.

data.title: Intrepid Potash announces strong 2025 results: $75M in total sales, record Trio® sales volumes, steady demand for fertilizer products.
data.description: Denver-based Intrepid Potash, Inc. (NYSE:IPI) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company reported steady demand for its fertilizer products, achieving record Trio® sales volumes, strong unit economics, and rising prices throughout the year. Key financial highlights include total sales amounting to $75 million.

data.title: Wayne Marble discusses differences between Judo, BJJ, and Kali for self defense in Blue Springs.
data.description: In Blue Springs, Missouri on March 4, 2026, a comparison was made between Judo, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, and Kali in terms of their approaches to real self-defense. The analysis, as per a HelloNation article, highlighted the distinctive teachings of each system regarding movement, balance, and awareness. This discussion provides valuable insights for individuals in Blue Springs seeking to enhance their self-defense skills.
